rag_context: Speaker diarization assigns speaker labels to speech segments.
Speech separation tries to split mixed audio into speaker-specific streams.
ASR quality often degrades when multiple speakers overlap.
LLM refinement may improve readability but can hallucinate unsupported words.

samples.reference: speaker one introduces the task speaker two explains the result
speaker one asks a question speaker two answers with partial overlap
both speakers talk at the same time and the transcript becomes difficult
